{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322021521D02C856EB4DA560F7794"}"},"total":909},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617863322206421822","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，开头和中后期其实有点酸涩文，小巴蒂那一段我真的哭成狗，这本不能算纯粹的爽文/甜文/大团圆包饺子，更偏向另一种满目疮痍但结局还算圆满，亲世代太痛，所有人物都很立体，正文还是詹姆斯if线有点互相补全吧，看到了太多意想不到的人（同人很少），被爱会疯长出血肉，让我觉得他们就是这样的人啊，灿烂又不完美，这样的原型人物正式完美本身，作者爱着很多人，哪怕他们的不是世俗意义上的好人，在这本文里的结局也不算很好，或者说就是这个人物给自己选择的最好的结局，重来一次ta还是会这么选。还有一点非常难得，这本文竟然让人会心一笑，而且是高级的笑点，不是烂梗或者为了沙雕而沙雕，万人迷处理也很舒适，书中人物和读者爱女主真的太合理了，如果我身边有一个这样的女孩，我也会爱她","text_exts":[{"e":285,"s":282,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774116922560F7794%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617863322206421822%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227531957739212246041%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773674794,"group_id":"7531957739212246041","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny4ORSgVgPtb1jAZ5nqTiaDd/OI3ok3SANG5TNcuFepb","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1418817325246571","user_name":"喜欢巴西松的宁老师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1418817325246571","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531957739212246041","book_info":{"abstract":"HP同人：【正文线犬&塞莉亚&狼，正文已完结】
【高亮：拆很多官配，超级万人迷，正文线不拆詹莉，平行世界番外会拆詹莉预警】
【獾院女主、社交恐怖分子、子世代主剧情、亲世代插叙、万人迷、白切黑、慢热很慢热】
　　塞莉亚·迪朗11岁的生日愿望是希望自己能打败天才兄弟姐妹，成为厨神，
　　——她收到了霍格沃茨的录取通知书，成为一名女巫；
　　塞莉亚·迪朗14岁的生日愿望是希望自己暗恋的詹姆斯·波特能开窍喜欢上自己，
　　——詹姆斯·波特当着她的面向她的好朋友莉莉·伊万斯表白；
　　塞莉亚·迪朗20岁的生日愿望是希望伏地魔速速完蛋，魔法界赶紧恢复和平，
　　——1岁的救世主打败了伏地魔，但她的朋友们在那一天死去。
　　塞莉亚·迪朗再也不会许愿了。
　　年近30岁的她回到霍格沃茨任教，打算照顾挚友的孩子平安长大。
　　结果孩子入学后的学校一年比一年危险不说，自己的桃花也太过泛滥成灾。
　　看着对自己告白的学生、同事、故人，还有越狱的狗……
　　塞莉亚陷入沉思。
　　不是，你怎么也喜欢我？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b6d11f4b648e5d259e370f12fb8a120c","author":"明七星","author_id":"","book_id":"7531957739212246041","book_name":"HP：不好！我的教资正在融化！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e8e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":853,"name":"白切黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=853&name=白切黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7532510971005256217","read_count":"68177","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1235686"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"550","tags":"女频衍生,校园,幻想言情,同人,白切黑,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d88962507be8e4e423176e13d7d98a16~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300922&x-signature=ENuka0CMawC%2FtT%2B1qhC5bM6JJhk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2546920313597648","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"500"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322021521D02C856EB4DA560F7794"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":84604,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":565},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7560937206765667096","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者的文笔在一系列泥石流中脱颖而出，不是如出一辙的女主套路，在原著的基础上做了很好的改编，很新颖，并非完全围绕三人组描写，女主的人设性格描写的很鲜明，其他角色的性格很贴合原著，完全没有出现特别ooc的情况，文中的小日常让人哈特软软，非常推荐阅读的一本书[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760420088,"group_id":"7531957739212246041","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4lALiDlc4yKTQA1uTUDnTpKUouun/KlBQSPDlMU0Ch9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9558ec501e6d4024ad1818898bfed1a0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702524&x-signature=3ZggVfN45RjhaXf5oxNbeLpojss%3D","user_id":"2217059660080062","user_name":"却乌云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2217059660080062","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531957739212246041","book_info":{"abstract":"HP同人：【正文线犬&塞莉亚&狼，正文已完结】

【獾院女主、社交恐怖分子、子世代主剧情、亲世代插叙、万人迷、白切黑、慢热很慢热】
　　塞莉亚·迪朗11岁的生日愿望是希望自己能打败天才兄弟姐妹，成为厨神，
　　——她收到了霍格沃茨的录取通知书，成为一名女巫；

　　——詹姆斯·波特当着她的面向她的好朋友莉莉·伊万斯表白；
　　塞莉亚·迪朗20岁的生日愿望是希望伏地魔速速完蛋，魔法界赶紧恢复和平，
　　——1岁的救世主打败了伏地魔，但她的朋友们在那一天死去。
　　塞莉亚·迪朗再也不会许愿了。
　　年近30岁的她回到霍格沃茨任教，打算照顾挚友的孩子平安长大。
　　结果孩子入学后的学校一年比一年危险不说，自己的桃花也太过泛滥成灾。
　　看着对自己告白的学生、同事、故人，还有越狱的狗……
　　塞莉亚陷入沉思。

暂时先写这些，以后有机会再补充。","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":12,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774116922560F7794%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227554933560916837145%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227531957739212246041%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759022997,"group_id":"7531957739212246041","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主角控。女主视角bg＞＞＞bl≥女无=男无。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzjFIrvzQbWnMed5ej05Sdc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e27d9bffb69943d4b8656ab6728dc625~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710449&x-signature=rxQ5cjiqdpiwfpC5fyoJ37H3uBs%3D","user_id":"61382741590","user_name":"初始叫查理的酢乙女爱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"61382741590","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531957739212246041","book_info":{"abstract":"HP同人：【正文线犬&塞莉亚&狼，正文已完结】
